positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a group of interconnected wild forest animals (deer, fox, owl, bear cub) in a cyclical formation. The style should be modern, geometric, and slightly abstract, using thick, continuous line work (single-line drawing aesthetic) combined with solid, flat color areas. The composition is perfectly centered, designed for a circular print placement on apparel. Use a limited, earthy color palette: deep forest greens, burnt orange, slate gray, and cream white. The overall mood is harmonious, whimsical, and sophisticated. Ensure strong contrast and clean, bold silhouettes against a negative space background. Ideal for screen printing or textile application.
